_fixture_notes: Case 9: Component registering against three component_layers entries across three different seeded frameworks (smorrebrod, mezze, component_dinner). Tests whether one component can register across multiple frameworks at once. All families null — only component_dinner/topping has seeded families and none of these layers is that, so mixed-family coverage is left to a dedicated fixture if needed.
name: Whipped Butter Bean Spread
description: A creamy butter bean spread that doubles as a dinner base, a lunch spread, or a side dip.

steps.title: Blend
steps.content: Blend {0001}, {0002}, {0003}, {0004}, {0005} and {0006} in a food processor until completely smooth. Add a splash of water if needed for consistency. Season generously.

notes: Keeps for 4 days. Loosen with water and a glug of olive oil before serving if it firms up.
